paper_tables.title: 数据集与 Ground Truth 构建
paper_tables.paper_location: 论文位置：Dataset construction；表：CC3M 候选挖掘与标注统计
paper_tables.what_it_answers: 我们用了什么真实数据、为什么不是随机抽样、标注集有多少正负例。
paper_tables.recommended_claim: We construct a real CC3M-based hard-candidate benchmark by first mining likely duplicate image-caption pair-pairs from a 200K pool and then manually annotating 1,000 candidate pairs.
paper_tables.do_not_write: 不要写 raw CC3M 的自然重复率就是 29.5%；这个比例只属于 high-joint hard-candidate 标注集。
rows: 从 CC3M 准备 200K image-caption pairs。
人工标注前先挖掘可能重复的候选 pair-pairs。
按 joint similarity 和 image similarity 过滤，用于标注采样。
用于 Stage 4 评价的人工标注样本。
paper_tables.gap: 如果要正式报告 inter-annotator agreement，需要真实合作者 audit；当前 audit 只是流程占位。

paper_tables.title: 主评价：Stage 4 与 Baselines 对比
paper_tables.paper_location: 论文表：CC3M hard-candidate benchmark 上的 Precision / Recall / F1
paper_tables.what_it_answers: Stage 4 是否比三个单模态拼接/naive union 更合理。
paper_tables.recommended_claim: On the current hard-candidate benchmark, Stage 4 improves over the naive union baseline, but image-only remains stronger; the paper should present this honestly and use error analysis to explain why.
paper_tables.do_not_write: 不要写 Stage 4 全面超过所有单模态 baseline；当前 image-only F1 更高。
rows: 当前 GT 上最强 baseline。
在 high-joint 候选集上明显过度预测正例。
单模态结果并集，代表简单拼接式多模态 baseline。
超过 naive union，但未超过 image-only。
paper_tables.gap: 如果想增强主 claim，下一步不是改口径，而是按预定方案跑 fair operating point / 下游验证。

paper_tables.title: 误差分析
paper_tables.paper_location: 论文图/表：Stage 4 失败样例与 image-only 对比
paper_tables.what_it_answers: 为什么 Stage 4 没超过 image-only，以及它错在哪里。
paper_tables.recommended_claim: A large fraction of Stage 4 false positives are caption-template cases, suggesting that identical or near-identical captions can over-amplify joint similarity even when image-level evidence is weaker.
paper_tables.do_not_write: 不要把误差分析写成最终算法失败；这里应写成当前表示选择的边界和后续改进方向。
rows: joint 判为重复但人工标签为负例。
人工正例中被 joint 阈值漏掉的样本。
Caption 完全相同的 joint FP 比例
模板化 caption 是主要 FP 来源之一。
Image 正确 / Joint 错误
解释为什么 image-only 当前更强。
Joint 正确 / Image 错误
说明跨模态信号确实有增益样本。

evidence.title: Image wins joint loses
evidence.description: Cases where image-only is correct and joint is wrong.

evidence.title: Joint wins image loses
evidence.description: Cases where Stage 4 is correct and image-only is wrong.

paper_tables.gap: 需要抽几组可视化例子放进论文或 appendix，而不是只给统计数。

paper_tables.title: 下游训练 A/B/C/D/E 数据划分
paper_tables.paper_location: 论文表：LLaVA 训练数据规模与下游结果
paper_tables.what_it_answers: 原始、单模态、naive union、Stage 4 五组训练数据规模分别是多少，后续 LLaVA 怎么跑。
paper_tables.recommended_claim: At this stage, the dashboard supports reporting materialized A/B/C/D/E training manifests and a real LLaVA-1.5 4-bit LoRA smoke test, but not downstream benchmark performance.
paper_tables.do_not_write: 不要写 VQAv2/TextVQA 有结果；当前 manifest 与真实模型 smoke 可证明训练链路可用，但正式下游结果还没有产生。

evidence.title: Experiment ledger
evidence.description: Includes data smoke and real LLaVA-1.5 4-bit LoRA smoke records.

paper_tables.gap: 下一步必须在 Windows 3090 上跑完整 A/B/C/D/E LLaVA LoRA，并产出 VQAv2/TextVQA 指标。

paper_tables.title: 系统效率与 Stage 4 开销
paper_tables.what_it_answers: Stage 4 增加了多少计算开销，是否可接受。
paper_tables.recommended_claim: Only partial timing can be written now; the real LLaVA smoke memory is recorded, while full Stage 4 component timing and full training memory are still missing.
paper_tables.do_not_write: 不要写完整系统开销表已经完成；LLaVA smoke 的 GPU memory 不能替代完整 Stage 4 embedding/search 或正式训练开销。
rows: 已有，但不是 GPU 开销
完整 Stage 4 / 正式训练 GPU peak memory
必须在 Windows RTX 3090 上记录
paper_tables.gap: 补 Windows 侧 GPU memory、CLIP embedding time、nearest-neighbor/search time、end-to-end throughput。

paper_tables.title: 论文数字安全与 Claim 控制
paper_tables.paper_location: 写作检查清单：把数字复制进论文前必须核对
paper_tables.what_it_answers: 哪些数字现在能写，哪些必须加限定，哪些还不能写。
paper_tables.recommended_claim: Use the dashboard as writing view, but use experiment files and ledger as source-of-truth.
paper_tables.do_not_write: 不要把 dashboard JSON 当 source-of-truth；它只是前端快照。
rows: 不是正式合作者一致性
真实合作者 audit 前不要报告。
不能从 high-joint benchmark 推断。
必须说明 image-only 在当前 benchmark 更强。
LLaVA 跑完前不能宣称训练效果。
paper_tables.gap: 写论文前逐表核对：每个数字必须有 experiment id。

plan_data_matrix.experiment: 实验 1：跨模态去重模块 Stage 4
plan_data_matrix.purpose: 核心 novelty：用 image-caption pair 级 joint embedding 做跨模态去重。

data_quality_audit.scope: Plan B Stage 4 current source-of-truth data, dashboard data, annotation labels, evaluation metrics, and A/B/C/D/E split-size estimates.
data_quality_audit.overall_assessment: The current data is internally consistent for engineering progress tracking and preliminary paper planning, but several numbers are not yet safe as final paper claims without qualification.

findings.title: Current audit agreement is not a real collaborator agreement statistic
findings.detail: The 200 audit labels are currently defaulted to the primary labels, producing agreement_rate=1.0. This is internally consistent but should not be reported as real inter-annotator agreement.
findings.action: Do not write agreement_rate=1.0 as collaborator agreement. Either obtain real collaborator audit labels or state that collaborator audit is pending.

findings.title: The high-joint ground truth is a hard-candidate evaluation set, not a random CC3M prevalence estimate
findings.detail: The labeled 1000 rows are sampled from joint>=0.80 and image>=0.60 candidates. This is appropriate for candidate-level evaluation but cannot estimate duplicate prevalence in raw CC3M.
findings.action: Describe the dataset as a mined hard-candidate benchmark. Do not claim 29.5% positives in CC3M overall.

findings.title: Naive/text baselines at low threshold degenerate into all-positive predictions
findings.detail: On the current high-joint labeled set, text-only and naive_union at threshold 0.60 predict all 1000 rows as duplicates, yielding F1=0.4556 from prevalence alone. This is a weak baseline point, not a meaningful operating point.
findings.action: When writing results, include threshold behavior and avoid overclaiming that Stage 4 beats a strong naive baseline unless a fair operating point is fixed.

findings.title: Stage 4 does not currently beat image-only on the 1000-row labeled set
findings.detail: Image-only best F1 is 0.6265 at threshold 0.80, while Stage 4 joint best F1 is 0.5835 at threshold 0.85. This must be discussed honestly.
findings.action: Frame Stage 4 as reducing naive multimodal over-deletion and improving over text/naive composition, but do not claim it dominates image-only on this set.

findings.title: A/B/C/D/E split sizes are graph-component estimates, not final training manifests
findings.detail: The split-size table is computed from candidate graph components over mined candidate edges. It is useful for planning, but final LLaVA training requires concrete manifest files and logs.
findings.action: Label Table 4.1 as partial until training manifests are generated.

findings.title: Text similarity creates many false positives through repeated captions/templates
findings.detail: Stage 4 joint false positives include 82/193 rows with identical captions, about 42.5%. This suggests text/template dominance in part of the joint score.
findings.action: Use this in error analysis and consider weighted joint variants or stricter image constraints if time allows.

findings.title: Manifest pair ids are non-contiguous but internally valid
findings.detail: The 200K manifest has 200000 unique pair ids, but the last id is cc3m_206611. Candidate edges are all inside the manifest, so this is not a consistency bug.
findings.action: Do not assume pair ids are contiguous. Always use manifest.csv as the pair universe.

safe_to_report_with_qualification: label distribution on the mined hard-candidate benchmark
Stage 4 vs image/text/naive metrics on the mined hard-candidate benchmark
not_safe_as_final_claim_yet: GPU peak memory and final efficiency table

risks.title: Stage 4 尚未超过 image-only
risks.detail: 当前 1000 条 high-joint 标注集上，joint F1=0.583，naive_union F1=0.456，但 image-only F1=0.626，需要做误差分析并谨慎写作。

risks.title: Audit agreement 不能当正式合作者一致性
risks.detail: 当前 agreement_rate=1.0 来自 audit_label 默认填主标签，只能说明流程完成，不能作为真实 inter-annotator agreement。

risks.title: 当前 GT 是 hard-candidate benchmark
risks.detail: 1000 条标注来自 joint>=0.80 且 image>=0.60 的候选池，不能用来估计原始 CC3M 的重复比例。

risks.title: embedding cache 仍只在 Windows 端
risks.detail: 200K CLIP embedding cache 约 762 MB，目前尚未完整镜像回 Mac。

risks.title: LLaVA 正式下游验证尚未完成
risks.detail: A/B/C/D/E 五组 200K split 已生成，真实 LLaVA-1.5-7B 4-bit LoRA smoke 已跑通 1 step；但完整 LoRA 训练与 VQAv2/TextVQA 指标尚未产生。

next_steps: 基于误差分析决定论文如何解释：joint 优于 naive union，但 image-only 在当前 high-joint GT 上更强。
基于已验证的 Windows WSL2 环境启动 A/B/C/D/E 五组 LLaVA LoRA 正式训练。
将 Windows 端 embedding cache 和后续 split 结果同步回 Mac source-of-truth。
为每个 LLaVA run 保存 config/metrics/logs，并同步回 Mac source-of-truth。
